_comment: Stores market rotation alert subscribers. For launch, groups are the main target. Players can be added later.

_notes.groups: Group JIDs subscribed to market rotation alerts.
_notes.users: Private user JIDs subscribed to market rotation alerts.
_notes.notifyGroupsOnly: If true, only groups receive alerts even if users are listed.
_notes.commands: These are reminder notes for the bot commands you plan to implement.

examples._comment: Examples only. The bot should overwrite/add real JIDs here later.

possibleLaterFeatures: cooldown to avoid repeated spam in the same group
